title: Auto-number for first column option

posts.author: soportecqmedical (Sergio Henriquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
One of the most significant limitations I’ve encountered is autonumbering in Monday. I want to use an ID as the primary column in many boards, but we have very little customization for this first column.
I’d like to connect a quote number between boards (and it must be autonumbered). This would avoid errors and duplicate IDs and connections to other boards.
What I’m explaining is not the same as a mirrored column.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @soportecqmedical

Welcome to the community! The app AutoID Column can write the generated sequential and customizable ID to the leftmost (name column.
